Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (substances used in the production of fentanyl)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (substances used in the production of fentanyl)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends Part 1 of Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act to add certain substances used in the production of fentanyl, so that they will be regulated as Class A precursors.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Part 1 of Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act is amended by adding the following after item 24:
